actions.text:
🚫 *Access Denied*

You are not in the Admins group.

⏱️ CRM session timed out.

Type *ops* to start again.

✅ CRM session ended.

Type *ops* to start again.
🔍 Enter the phone number (digits only, e.g. 50937145893):
⚠️ Contact not found or API error.

➕ *Create Contact*

Enter WhatsApp number (digits only, e.g. 50937145893):
⚠️ Failed to create contact. Check the number isn't already registered.

🚫 *Block Contact*

Enter the phone number to block (digits only):
⚠️ No contact found for that number.

⚠️ *This will block:*

Name: @webhook.json.results.0.name
Number: @results.block_phone.value

Type *CONFIRM* to proceed or anything else to cancel.

🔓 *Unblock Contact*

Enter the phone number to unblock (digits only):
⚠️ No contact found for that number.

📋 *Segments:*

• @webhook.json.results.0.name (@webhook.json.results.0.count members)
• @webhook.json.results.1.name (@webhook.json.results.1.count members)
• @webhook.json.results.2.name (@webhook.json.results.2.count members)
• @webhook.json.results.3.name (@webhook.json.results.3.count members)
• @webhook.json.results.4.name (@webhook.json.results.4.count members)
• @webhook.json.results.5.name (@webhook.json.results.5.count members)
• @webhook.json.results.6.name (@webhook.json.results.6.count members)
• @webhook.json.results.7.name (@webhook.json.results.7.count members)
➕ Enter a name for the new segment:

🗑️ *Delete Segment*

• @webhook.json.results.0.name
• @webhook.json.results.1.name
• @webhook.json.results.2.name
• @webhook.json.results.3.name
• @webhook.json.results.4.name
• @webhook.json.results.5.name

Type the *exact segment name* to delete:
⚠️ No segment found with that name. Check spelling and try again.

⚠️ *This will permanently delete segment:*

Name: @webhook.json.results.0.name
UUID: @webhook.json.results.0.uuid

Type *CONFIRM* to proceed or anything else to cancel.
✉️ Enter the recipient's WhatsApp number (digits only, e.g. 50937145893):

📢 *Broadcast to Group*

• @webhook.json.results.0.name (@webhook.json.results.0.count)
• @webhook.json.results.1.name (@webhook.json.results.1.count)
• @webhook.json.results.2.name (@webhook.json.results.2.count)
• @webhook.json.results.3.name (@webhook.json.results.3.count)
• @webhook.json.results.4.name (@webhook.json.results.4.count)

Type the *exact group name*:
⚠️ No group found with that name. Check spelling and try again.

✅ Found group *@webhook.json.results.0.name* (@webhook.json.results.0.count members)

📝 Type the broadcast message:
⚠️ No flow found with that name. Check spelling.

✅ Found flow *@webhook.json.results.0.name*

📱 Enter the contact's WhatsApp number (digits only):
✏️ Enter the global key to update:

✅ CRM session ended.

Type *ops* to start again.
